description:
Cough Mixtures containing chlorpheniramine, amm cl, citric
acid, Na citrate, ipecacuanha, arise oil, menthol (Syrup)
Antazoline HCL, Tetrazoline HCL, Methylhydroxy Propyl cellulose. (Eye Drops)
Typhoid vaccine (TAB) [to be accessed at government health facilities] (Injection)
HPV Vaccine (Quadrivalent) [to be accessed at governement helth centres] (Injection)
Benzyl benzoate + bismuth Oxide + Bismuth subgallate+ Hydrocortisone + Peru balsam (Suppository)
Benzyl benzoate + bismuth Oxide + Bismuth subgallate+ Hydrocortisone (Suppository)
Aluminium hydroxide +Magnesium Hydroxide +Simethicone (Mixture (with or without diglycirrhizinnated)
Chlorbutanol + Paradichlorobenzene+ Arachis oil + Turpentine oil (Ear drops)
Fludrocortisone acetate + neomycin + polymyxin B Cream (Cream)
Amino caproic acid (AA) plus lipid thromboplastin (LT) (Injection)
Amoxycillin plus Clavulanic Acid (Co-amoxiclav) (Powder for oral consumption)
Artesunate [Restricted, to be taken as combination] (Syrup)
Artesunate [Restricted, to be taken as combination] (Tablet)
Suramin (price not available at the time of compilation)
Oxaminquine, tablet (price not available at the time of compilation)
hepatitis c rna viral load (genexpert pcr) *
b) z.n stain for afb x 3
radiotherapy - radical treatment (per session) - partial coverage (50%)
slipped disc/low back pain per visit
**for other paediatric surgery procedures pls check general surgery
posterior saggital anorectoplasty (for all stages of surgery)
pull through for hirshprung's disease(for all stages of surgery)
electroconvulsive therapy (course of 6 sessions) Price per session
optical coherence tomography oct per eye (partial coverage)
traumatic corneal and/or limbal/scleral laceration repair
removal of foreign bodies from conjuctiva and cornea
low Priced spectacles - frame and lens (1 in not less than18 months)
cholecystectomy with excision of to mass
cholecystectomy and drainage of liver abscess
urethro-vesicopexy, combined abdominal and vaginal approach
transurethral dessication of congenital meatal stenoses
surgery of complications of diverticular disease
surgery of acute intra abdominal vascular disease
repair of bochidalek diaphragmatic congenital defect
phytomatous growth in the scalp - excision
orchidopexy, with circumsion, with eversion of sac, with herniotomy
oesophagogastrectomy with interposition of colonic/jejunal segment
oesophageal atresia and tracheo-oesophageal fistula repair
ligation of hepatic/left gastric splenic artery
foreign body removal in deep region
extensive (small and large) bowel resection and anastomoses
surgery of torsion of spermatic cord
surgical drainage in haematoma of rectus abdominis
dorsal slit and reduction of paraphimosis
catheterization of urinary bladder per session (up to three sessions annually)
biopsy of tumour of abdominal wall
surgical repair of congenital talipes equanovarus/ valgus
reconstruction surgeries: acromium, head of femur etc
haemodialysis (50:50 partial coverage; up to 6 sessions)
ventrosuspension procedures of correction of uterine prolapse
reconstruction of vagina (e.g. secondary to vaginal atresia)
caesarean section, elective, emergency, single live born, twin etc
d&c / evacuation of retained products of conception
fixation of fracture of the jaw
reduction and fixation of maxillary fractures
reduction and fixation of jaw fractures
posterior canal reconstruction after radical mastoidectomy
neck exploration for penetrating neck injury
laryngeal stenosis, laryngocele, abductor paralysis, laryngo-fissure
autogenous bone graft to mastoid cavity
antrostomy - nasal sinus surgery (e.g., middle/inferior meatal/ caldwell luc)
foreign body removal from nose (under ga)
aseptic destruction of labyrinth for meniere's disease
special nursing care (e.g., intensive care, scbu, paediatric emergency etc)
